product.body_html:
Seven out of ten adults are magnesium deficient right now — and most have no idea that's why they feel the way they do.

Magnesium doesn't get the attention it deserves. It's not a trending superfood. It's not sold in flashy packaging. But without adequate magnesium, your body literally cannot function normally: your muscles cramp, your sleep fractures, your stress hormones spiral, and your heart rhythm becomes irregular. Over 300 enzymatic reactions in the human body depend on this single mineral — including DNA repair, protein synthesis, and energy production. Most people don't get enough from food alone, and the forms in most supplements (oxide, carbonate) have absorption rates as low as 4%.

Romira Magnesium Glycinate Gummies solve the absorption problem directly. The glycinate form chelates magnesium to the amino acid glycine, creating a compound your intestinal wall absorbs efficiently and your gut tolerates easily. Whether you're supporting sleep, managing stress, preventing muscle cramps, or just covering a fundamental daily nutritional need — this is the smarter form of magnesium. Available in 1, 3, and 5 month supply so you never run out.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ Replenishes magnesium deficiency — affects 70% of adults
  • ✓ Supports 300+ enzymatic reactions including energy and DNA repair
  • ✓ Improves sleep quality and duration
  • ✓ Reduces stress and regulates cortisol response
  • ✓ Supports muscle recovery and prevents cramps
  • ✓ Promotes healthy bone density and cardiovascular rhythm
  • ✓ High-absorption glycinate form — gentle on the digestive system

Formulation

Magnesium glycinate in a convenient gummy format. Available in 1-month, 3-month, and 5-month supply to support consistent daily use — because magnesium works best when taken every day.

Who It's For

Anyone wanting daily magnesium replenishment — especially those with sleep issues, high stress, muscle cramps, or anyone not consistently eating magnesium-rich foods like leafy greens, nuts, and seeds.

Fix the deficiency that's quietly holding you back — start your daily magnesium habit with Romira today.
